input: SELECT o.__id, o.__kind, COUNT(e.target_id) as edge_count FROM objects o LEFT JOIN edges e ON o.__id = e.source_id WHERE o.__kind = 'Feature' GROUP BY o.__id, o.__kind ORDER BY o.__id
expected: SELECT o.__id, o.__kind, COUNT(e.target_id) AS edge_count FROM objects o LEFT JOIN edges e ON o.__id = e.source_id AND e.__workspace = 'ws2' WHERE o.__kind = 'Feature' AND o.__workspace = 'ws2' GROUP BY o.__id, o.__kind ORDER BY o.__id ASC
